case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. ASHLEY PIA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,056.90 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT PIA, ASHLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
